title: taraxacum clarum
intro: Taraxacum clarum, also known as the clear dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion genus, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and clear sap. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum clarum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its healing properties. The health benefits associated with the plant include its ability to aid in digestion, boost the immune system, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Taraxacum clarum can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
